name: WEIQIAO TEXTILE CO. H YC1
summary: Weiqiao Textile Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, distributes, and sells cotton yarns, grey fabrics, and denims primarily in Mainland China, Hong Kong, East Asia, Southeast Asia, South Asia, and internationally. It operates through Textile Products, and Electricity and Steam segments. The company's products include carded, combed, compact, and open-ended spun cotton yarns; grey fabrics, such as plain fabrics, twill weave fabrics, tribute silk series, jacquard series, and khaki drills; and cotton, cotton spandex elasticity, cotton dacron elasticity, cotton and bamboo blend, bamboo joint, cotton regenerated cellulose fibers blend, and other denims. It also produces and sells polyester yarn and related products; and trades in textile raw materials and products. In addition, the company is involved in the generation and sale of electricity and steam businesses. As of December 31, 2020, it had an installed capacity of 2,760 megawatts of thermal power assets. The company is based in Zouping, the People's Republic of China. Weiqiao Textile Company Limited is a subsidiary of Shandong Weiqiao Chuangye Group Company Limited.
